## Summary

Describe the user-visible or operational change.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run docs:check`

## Documentation impact

- [ ] Updated `STATUS.md` with the current capability, blocker, or next step.
- [ ] Updated schema, Supabase operations, and/or an ADR for durable data or security changes.
- [ ] Updated `docs/DESIGN.md` and `components/README.md` for affected handoff screens or shared UI.
- [ ] No canonical documentation change was needed; rationale is included above.
